title: Goolap
description: A soft, pink-themed Minecraft texture pack designed for clean, cute, and relaxing visuals. Goolap keeps things simple, aesthetic, and easy on the eyes without ruining the vanilla feel.
body:
### **🌸 Introducing Goolap Soft, Cute, and Pink Perfection 🌸** This isn’t a tryhard PvP pack. **Goolap** is built for people who want their game to feel soft, aesthetic, and unapologetically pink. Every texture is designed to look cute without turning your screen into a mess. If you like clean visuals + pastel vibes, this is it. --- ### **💖 What Makes Goolap Different? 💖** * **Soft Pink Palette:** Everything is reworked with calming pink tones and gentle colors that don’t hurt your eyes. * **Clean & Cute Textures:** Simplified visuals with a polished, cozy feel—no clutter, no noise. * **Vanilla-Friendly:** Keeps the original Minecraft style, just cuter and smoother. * **Pleasant Gameplay:** Looks good in survival, PvP, or just walking around doing nothing. --- ### **🎀 Why You’ll Actually Use It 🎀** Most “cute” packs either look messy or overdone. **Goolap** doesn’t. It’s balanced: - Not too bright - Not too washed out - Not distracting Just clean, soft visuals that make the game feel better. --- ### **🌷 A Pack Made for Pink Lovers 🌷** If your favorite color is pink, you already know. **Goolap** turns Minecraft into something cozy, aesthetic, and actually enjoyable to look at for long sessions. No edgy themes, no forced “pro” look—just pure vibe. --- ### **💗 Download It and Chill 💗** No grind mindset required. Just install it, load your world, and enjoy how everything looks. ---
✨ Credits ✨ This pack includes textures and models inspired by or based on work from other talented creators, with edits and adjustments made by me. - **[Smooth Bow Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-bow-animations)** - **[♡Princess PVP♡ ~ cute PVP texture pack (1.16 UPDATE)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/princess-pvp-cute-pvp-texture-pack/)**
--- ### **🌸 More Packs You Might Like 🌸** - **[Blocks 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocks-3d/)** – Adds depth to your builds with detailed 3D blocks - **[Crazy's Better Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crazys-better-font)** – Cleaner and sharper text - **[Crazy PvP Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crazy-pvp-pack)** – High-energy visuals for PvP players - **[Ecoson 50k](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ecoson-50k)** – PvP-focused pack with a sharp design, created to celebrate Ecoson’s 50K downloads on Modrinth. - **[Framed Wool](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/framed-wool)** – Clean outlines for every wool block - **[Mafiya's 10k Pack [Official]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mafiya-10k-pack)** – PvP-focused pack with sharp design --- ### **🐞 Found Something Weird? 🐞** Join the [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/yhDtEfXp4w) and report it. Simple. --- ### 📞 Contact 📞

--- ### **📢 Share It If You Like It 📢** If **Goolap** fits your vibe, send it to your friends or your server. Cute Minecraft > boring Minecraft.
